headline: No 'Razzle-Dazzle' With Latest iPhone, But Apple Wowed With These 2 'Glowtime' Announcements, Says Gurman
summary: Apple, Inc. unveiled iPhone 16 at the Glowtime event last week did not live up to the hype but it made up for some of the disappointment with its hearing aid and health upgrades, said Bloomberg's Mark Gurman on Sunday.

headline: Elon Musk Reacts As Tesla Makes 100 Millionth 4680 Cells, Enough To Produce Over 73,500 Cybertrucks
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc has made its 100 millionth 4680 cell to be used inside its Cybertruck vehicle, the company said on Saturday.
